creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Hans,

I just tried the patch you submitted to update piwik to 1.10 but the
checksum does not seem correct:

fetch: http://builds.piwik.org/piwik-1.10.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 5805995, actual 5806842

Do you know what happened with the archive?

Cheers,
Frederic
